title: Luffy Endures the Assault
description: On pages 9–12, luffy endures the assault focuses on Luffy, Arlong, Nami, Cocoyashi villagers as arlong unleashes his brutal speed and teeth-based attacks as Luffy refuses to back down.
scene: On pages 9–12, luffy endures the assault focuses on Luffy, Arlong, Nami, Cocoyashi villagers as arlong unleashes his brutal speed and teeth-based attacks as Luffy refuses to back down.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: They're the same eyes that a sea king has when it goes berserk!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Luffy made him even angrier with his attack just now...!

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: ...that's the first time I've seen those eyes!

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: How dare an infe- Rlor human...

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: didn't hurt but it looks like he's seriously pissed off...

summary: This part pushes the Arlong Park battle forward, clarifying who is fighting, what is at stake, and why Nami’s freedom matters.
